pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 11 confirms file is created at this exact path
setup_task.sh line 8 and export_result.sh line 9 confirm output file path
setup_task.sh line 13 shows actual conference name includes '2025'
task.json description explicitly requires LANDSCAPE orientation; export_result.sh verifies for 'print-orientation="landscape"'
All three strings found in schedule_data.json: 'Opening Keynote: The Future of Interoperability' (line 30), 'Networking Lunch' (line 44), 'Closing Panel: Patient Advocacy' (line 58)

All three strings found in schedule_data.json concurrent sessions: 'AI in Radiology: Early Detection Models' (line 36), 'FHIR Standards Update v5.0' (line 37), 'HIPAA Compliance in the Cloud Era' (line 38)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a conference schedule grid document in Apache OpenOffice Writer. The input data is synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh as part of task initialization. Input file is /home/ga/Documents/schedule_data.json containing the 'Midwest Digital Health Summit 2025' schedule with 6 time slots (Registration, Opening Keynote, 2 concurrent session blocks, Networking Lunch, and Closing Panel). The expected output is /home/ga/Documents/Summit_Schedule_2025.odt. The document must be in landscape orientation. The schedule includes three concurrent track sessions with titles containing 'AI in Radiology', 'FHIR Standards', and 'HIPAA Compliance'. Plenary sessions (Opening Keynote, Networking Lunch, Closing Panel) must merge table cells spanning the three track columns.
